name: Blackspire Environment
postCreateCommand: npm install || true && if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend && npm install && cd ..; fi && npm install -g @openai/codex && chmod +x scripts/agent-start.sh scripts/agent-save.sh scripts/sync-workspace.sh scripts/install-git-hooks.sh scripts/check-required-env.sh scripts/materialize-env-from-secrets.sh && scripts/install-git-hooks.sh && echo 'alias agent-start="bash /workspaces/blackspire-helix-group/scripts/agent-start.sh"' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'alias agent-save="bash /workspaces/blackspire-helix-group/scripts/agent-save.sh"' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'alias bh="cd /workspaces/blackspire-helix-group"' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'alias env-check="bash /workspaces/blackspire-helix-group/scripts/check-required-env.sh"' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'alias env-sync="bash /workspaces/blackspire-helix-group/scripts/materialize-env-from-secrets.sh"' >> ~/.bashrc
